[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00101001 3
1 01100000 2
2 01100110 4
3 01100011 4
4 01100001 3
5 00100000 1
6 00101000 2
7 00101001 3

12 21 01100001 3 match 4
23 32 00100000 1 match 5
34 43 00101000 2 match 6
45 54 00101001 3 match 0 7
56 65 01100000 2 match 1
67 76 01100000 2 match 1
70 07 01100010 3
